github.copilot.chat.commitMessageGenerat.text:
Generate commit messages strictly following the Conventional Commits specification and the commitlint rules defined in .commitlintrc.yml.

Format: <type>(<scope>): <subject>

Rules:
- type: must be one of: feat, fix, hotfix, release, refactor, perf, test, docs, chore, ci, build, revert
- scope: optional, must be lower-case (e.g. secret-store, service-launcher, systore-ctl, pipelines, deps)
- subject: sentence-case (first letter uppercase, rest lowercase), max 72 characters, no period at end, must not be empty
- body lines: max 100 characters per line
- footer lines: max 100 characters per line

Examples of valid messages:
  feat(secret-store): Add DPAPI provider fallback chain
  fix(service-launcher): Resolve null reference on startup
  chore: Update NuGet package versions
  ci(pipelines): Add commitlint pre-commit hook via Husky
  docs(systore-ctl): Document apply command options
